text.title: backlog-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for backlog-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Ready item has no acceptance criteria, or AC is a restatement of the title.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Untestable AC makes sprint planning slow and definition-of-done review impossible.

failure-mode.description: Acceptance criteria pasted verbatim from feature requests or support tickets.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Customer-sourced AC is typically ambiguous prose, not testable Given/When/Then statements. Unreviewed AC causes failed sprint review.
